9999P4863.4863.250418163158.H8S6.name: Vishnu Babu
9999P4863.4863.250418163158.H8S6.review: At Chandy`s Best In Town Restaurant & Cafe, I was greeted by the warm smiles of the friendly staff, who made me feel right at home. The authentic cuisine was a delightful journey through rich flavors and traditional recipes. The trained staff were knowledgeable and attentive, ensuring an impeccable dining experience. Highly recommend for food lovers!

9999P4863.4863.171224235905.A6W7.name: Esther RaniS
9999P4863.4863.171224235905.A6W7.review: I went to Spoon Bakery & Food Court and the staff was impolite. The prices were expensive but the quantity of food was good. It`s a nice place for groups, but the staff`s attitude needs improvement.

9999P4863.4863.190802221410.S8R9.name: Deepa Sivakumar
9999P4863.4863.190802221410.S8R9.review: My experience at River View  restaurant  was outstanding! The food portion sizes were generous, ensuring great value for the money spent. Each dish was packed with flavor, showcasing authentic local cuisine. The ambiance by the river added to the charm, making it a perfect spot for a hearty meal.

9999P4863.4863.220321230327.E7U4.name: Emmanuel Gerard
9999P4863.4863.220321230327.E7U4.review: Hi..my wife and myself visited Thekkady for the first time..before we reached I searched for a good homely restaurant and found Tusker Cafe as my best choice..and we were not disappointed at all..wow awesome kerala cuisine..and also priced reasonably..and the best part was Lobo the owner was a past student of Loyola college chennai like me..he is such a good host..Lobo awesome food ..thank you..I would recommend anyone going to thekkady to dine in Tusker Cafe..all the best to Lobo and his team
